Esoteric Tradition
News
March 2026
esoterictradition.com launches
The official digital presence of the Parish of Esoteric Tradition is now live. The Athenaeum, store, and full archive of projects are forthcoming.
Rev. Matron Thorn
Rev. Matron Thorn
First Prestige of Altharos, Rev. Matron Thorn. Founder of Altharos, CEO and director of Esoteric Tradition. Artist and musician of the Athenaeum of Esoteric Tradition. Born in Florida, United States of America. Permanently residing in Finland.
Altharosen ensimmainen Prestige, Rev. Matron Thorn. Altharosen perustaja, Esoteric Traditionin toimitusjohtaja ja johtaja. Esoteric Traditionin Athenaeumin taiteilija ja muusikko. Syntynyt Floridassa, Yhdysvalloissa. Asuu pysyvasti Suomessa.
Store

All orders are fulfilled directly by the Parish of Esoteric Tradition, dispatched from Finland. Payment is processed securely through PayPal.

Athenaeum
I
The Athenaeum is under construction.
An index of all projects and their histories
will be established here in due course.
Services
Graphic Design
Album artwork, layout, visual identity, and print design. Commissions accepted for physical and digital formats.
Music Video Production
Concept, direction, and post-production of music videos. Collaborations considered on a per-project basis.
Proofreading & Editing
Editorial review of manuscripts, liner notes, press materials, and literary texts. Attention to register and voice.
Art Direction
Creative and aesthetic oversight for releases, publications, and visual projects from concept through execution.
Mixing & Mastering
Professional mixing and mastering for recorded music across extreme, ambient, and experimental genres.
Session Instrumentation
Session instrumental contributions available. Enquire with details of the project and required instrumentation.
